prerequisites: An active WorkflowMax account with API access enabled.
A WorkflowMax Account Key (entered in the connector as account_id), which identifies your WorkflowMax organisation.
A WorkflowMax API Key (entered as api_key_2). Obtain both the Account Key and API Key from WorkflowMax (its support team) for your account.
A replication start date (start_date) to bound the initial sync of records.

authMethods.name: API key and account key
authMethods.summary: WorkflowMax authenticates each request with two credentials sent as query parameters against https://api.workflowmax.com/: apiKey (your API Key, supplied here as the secret field api_key_2) and accountKey (your Account Key, supplied as account_id). For example: https://api.workflowmax.com/client.api/list?apiKey=<API key>&accountKey=<account key>. Both values are issued by WorkflowMax; there is no username/password login for the API.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your WorkflowMax Account Key and API Key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your WorkflowMax account and request API access. WorkflowMax issues two credentials for the API: an Account Key (identifying your organisation) and an API Key. Per WorkflowMax integration guidance, these are obtained from WorkflowMax / its support team. Keep both values handy and ensure there are no leading or trailing spaces.

setupSteps.title: Set the account_id field
setupSteps.body: Enter your WorkflowMax Account Key in the connector's account_id field. This value is sent as the accountKey query parameter on every request to https://api.workflowmax.com/.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_key_2 field
setupSteps.body: Enter your WorkflowMax API Key in the secret field api_key_2. This value is sent as the apiKey query parameter and authenticates the connector against the WorkflowMax API.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Provide start_date to define the earliest point from which the connector reads records on the first sync. This bounds the initial backfill from your WorkflowMax data.

setupSteps.title: Validate the connection
setupSteps.body: Run the connector. It calls the WorkflowMax API at https://api.workflowmax.com/ using your apiKey and accountKey. A successful response confirms the credentials and account access are correct; an authentication error indicates an incorrect or unauthorised key pair.
